refnamediv.refpurpose: Manage sheets in an Excel file.

listitem.para: A string specifying the path to the Excel (.xlsx) file.
A string specifying the operation to perform: "create", "delete", "rename", or "info".
Create a new sheet in the workbook.
sheet_name (string): Name of the new sheet
sheet_index (integer, optional): Position where to insert the sheet (1-based). If omitted, sheet is added at the end.
Remove a sheet from the workbook.
sheet_identifier: Sheet name (string) or index (positive integer)
Change the name of an existing sheet.
sheet_identifier: Current sheet name (string) or index (positive integer)
new_name (string): New name for the sheet
Get information about the workbook or a specific sheet.
Without sheet_identifier: Returns complete workbook information (all sheets)
With sheet_identifier: Returns information for the specified sheet only

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Manage Excel workbook operations: create new sheets, delete existing sheets, rename sheets, or retrieve sheet information.
"create" - Create a new sheet in the workbook:

listitem.para: Syntax: xlsxSheet(filename, "create", sheet_name [, sheet_index])
sheet_name: Name of the new sheet (string)
sheet_index: Optional position where to insert the sheet (1-based). If omitted, sheet is added at the end.
Creates the file if it doesn't exist

refsection.para: "delete" - Remove a sheet from the workbook:

listitem.para: Syntax: xlsxSheet(filename, "delete", sheet_identifier)
sheet_identifier: Sheet name (string) or index (positive integer)
Error if sheet doesn't exist or if attempting to delete the last remaining sheet

refsection.para: "rename" - Change the name of an existing sheet:

listitem.para: Syntax: xlsxSheet(filename, "rename", sheet_identifier, new_name)
sheet_identifier: Current sheet name (string) or index (positive integer)
new_name: New name for the sheet (string)
Error if sheet doesn't exist or if new_name is already used by another sheet

refsection.para: "info" - Get information about the workbook or a specific sheet:

listitem.para: Syntax: xlsxSheet(filename, "info") or xlsxSheet(filename, "info", sheet_identifier)
Without sheet_identifier: Returns complete workbook information (all sheets)
With sheet_identifier: Returns information for the specified sheet only
This operation calls xlsxInfo internally

refsection.para: Sheets can be identified by name (string) or by 1-based index (integer). Index 1 refers to the first sheet.

refsection.title: Return values
refsection.para: The return value depends on the operation performed:

listitem.para: "create", "delete", "rename": Returns an operation result code (typically 0 for success, non-zero for errors).
"info": Returns a structure containing workbook/sheet information: see xlsxInfo.

refsection.para: If an error occurs (sheet not found, invalid operation...), an error message is raised.

refsection.title: Examples
